name: Ka-Bobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb chicken or beef, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the chicken or beef cubes in a ziploc bag.
2. Add Italian salad dressing to the bag and seal it.
3. Freeze the bag until ready for use.
4. On the camping trip (or the day you grill), remove the meat from the freezer and thaw it by placing the bag in a pan of cold water.
5. Chop up peppers, tomatoes, mushrooms, and onions.
6. Thread the meat cubes onto skewers with the chopped vegetables.
7. Cook over medium coals until done. Enjoy!
